member.name: T:Tutor.MAUI.App
member.summary: MAUI application shell for the Tutor platform. Handles application lifecycle events including initializing the logging subsystem, loading log-level settings, bootstrapping the background task queue on startup, and persisting queue state when the app is suspended.

member.name: M:Tutor.MAUI.App.#ctor(Tutor.Core.Services.Logging.LogStorageService,SettingsService,System.IServiceProvider)
member.summary: Initializes the application, loading persisted logs, log-level settings, and bootstrapping the background queue service for async task processing.

member.name: M:Tutor.MAUI.App.CreateWindow(Microsoft.Maui.IActivationState)
member.summary: Creates the application window with the main Blazor WebView page.

member.name: M:Tutor.MAUI.App.OnSleep
member.summary: Persists background queue state when the app enters the background.

member.name: T:Tutor.MAUI.MainPage
member.summary: Root content page hosting the BlazorWebView that renders the Tutor platform's Razor-based educational interface.

member.name: M:Tutor.MAUI.MainPage.#ctor
member.summary: Initializes the Blazor WebView host page from XAML.

member.name: T:Tutor.MAUI.MauiProgram
member.summary: Application entry point and DI composition root for the Tutor platform. Registers 40+ services spanning AI-powered concept extraction, knowledge graph construction, vector embeddings, course management, quizzes, news, and background task processing. HTTP clients for AI services use extended timeouts (2-5 minutes) to accommodate large document processing and LLM inference latency.

member.name: M:Tutor.MAUI.MauiProgram.CreateMauiApp
member.summary: Builds the MAUI application with all services registered in the DI container. Service categories include platform abstractions, OpenAI integration, content processing, knowledge graph services, course management, authentication, and background queues.

member.name: T:Tutor.MAUI.Services.MauiAppDataPathProvider
member.summary: MAUI platform implementation of . Resolves to the platform-specific app data directory (e.g., %LOCALAPPDATA% on Windows, ~/Library/Application Support on macOS) for persistent file storage.

member.name: T:Tutor.MAUI.Services.MauiFilePickerService
member.summary: MAUI platform implementation of . Presents the native file picker dialog with platform-specific MIME type mapping, allowing users to select learning resources (PDFs, documents, etc.) for import.

member.name: M:Tutor.MAUI.Services.MauiFilePickerService.PickFileAsync(System.String[])
member.summary: Opens the native file picker filtered to the specified extensions. Maps extensions to MIME types for Android compatibility. Returns null if the user cancels the picker.

member.name: T:Tutor.MAUI.Services.MauiSecurePreferences
member.summary: MAUI platform implementation of using . Provides encrypted key-value storage backed by the platform's secure enclave (Keychain on iOS/macOS, KeyStore on Android, DPAPI on Windows) for storing sensitive data like API keys.

member.name: T:Tutor.MAUI.Resource
member.summary: Android Resource Designer class. Exposes the Android Resource designer assembly into the project Namespace.
